events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: Loop checks & wiring industrial site, rough-complete. Photos show several completed pieces, but area count and remaining scope not listed. Submitted package does not include quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint. Reference: loop drawings, ISA 5.1.

We need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since package lacks quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint, cannot verify completeness. Need more info. Risk? Maybe medium because incomplete documentation could hide scope gaps. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions none. Percent complete unknown maybe 50? Value 0. Confidence moderate. Findings: missing quantity takeoff / area count, cannot determine remaining scope. Actions: submit quantity takeoff and area count, reconcile against loop drawings, complete loop check documentation per ISA 5.1. Rationale. References: loop drawings, ISA 5.1.

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
